handoffs.review:
**Artifact:** `morning-briefing-review.md`
**Verdict:** ISSUES
**Checks passed:** 8/9 (7 clean, 1 with 1 minor note)
**Issues found:** 4 (3 critical, 1 minor)

**Summary of findings:**

| Finding | Ticker | Severity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Check 8 — Coverage | IONQ | Critical | Card uses multi-word verdict "HOLD WITH AWARENESS" — regex fails, card unrecognized |
| Check 8 — Coverage | CIFR | Critical | Card uses `#`-level header instead of `###` — parser skips it entirely |
| Check 8 — Coverage | CLSK | Critical | Card uses `#`-level header instead of `###` — parser skips it entirely |
| Check 3 — Verdict | NU | Minor | Momentum label shows "Neutral" but RSI 35.1 qualifies as Bearish; verdict (REDUCE) correct regardless |

**Root cause:** The assembler cards for IONQ, CIFR, and CLSK were written in non-standard formats. Because the parser can't identify these cards, their exit criteria, pending orders, and verdict logic were not verified by any of the 9 checks. The mathematical checks (P/L, day counts, entry gates, regime, data consistency) all passed cleanly for the 6 tickers the parser could find.

**Required fix:** Reformat the 3 card headers to the standard `### TICKER — VERDICT — P/L X%` pattern before the briefing is considered fully verified.
